signals.headline: Cavaliers lead Raptors 2-0 after Game 2 win 115-105** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[4][6]
signals.raw:
Cavaliers lead Raptors 2-0 after Game 2 win 115-105** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[4][6]

The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 in Game 2 of their first-round NBA playoff series at Rocket Mortgage Arena, taking a 2-0 series lead, with Donovan Mitchell scoring 30 points and James Harden adding 28[4][6].
